title: Attend Resume Understanding SOP walkthrough
description: Understand the core processes of analyzing candidate profiles, verifying tech stacks, and mapping project timelines.

title: Review checklist of common resume mistakes
description: Study the playbook for identifying exaggerated architectures, generic storylines, or mismatched timelines.

title: Shadow 2–3 active candidate resume prep sessions
description: Observe a Team Lead running active candidate calls and take detailed notes on call flow and questioning.

title: Create sample candidate project document
description: Practice drafting an end-to-end project description sheet detailing system architecture, user stories, and role scope.

title: Draft project architecture and tech stack diagram
description: Map out components, database schemas, integration layers, and infrastructure configurations for practice.

title: Draft candidate project verbal storyline
description: Write a clear, structured explanation mapping project challenges, technical choices, and resolutions.

title: Conduct 1 supervised candidate resume prep call
description: Lead the call under buddy observation; receive real-time feedback on tone, pace, and alignment.

title: Pass Resume Understanding TL evaluation review
description: Obtain official sign-off from your Lead on project documentation and profile analysis capabilities.

title: Observe 2 active mock interviews
description: Audit real mock sessions, noting evaluation formats, rubrics, and feedback logs.

title: Learn interviewer tone, pacing & answer-guiding rules
description: Study strict SOPs regarding time management, positive reinforcement, and redirecting candidate focus.

title: Practice live Google Doc feedback logging
description: Log candidate answers and real-time ratings dynamically during shadow sessions without lagging.

title: Conduct 1 mock interview under direct TL supervision
description: Conduct a full mock session as the lead interviewer; receive structured performance comments.

title: Review mock evaluation performance & address gap areas
description: Discuss feedback with your TL and complete targeted practice drills to address alignment gaps.

title: Walk through all assessment platforms
description: Configure and log into platforms like HackerRank, Codility, and internal test modules.

title: Learn platform credentials security & access protocols
description: Study the rules for permissions, candidate logins, and access-denial email templates.

title: Learn screen/audio recording compliance rules
description: Understand the requirements for starting recordings, verifying webcam feeds, and isolating screens.

title: Solve sample coding & analytical reasoning tests
description: Complete internal test sets to understand candidate experiences and common issues.

title: Observe 1–2 assessment support sessions
description: Shadow a coordinator checking credentials, starting streams, and logging activity.

title: Review zero-tolerance rules for assessment support
description: Study strict compliance rules against credentials helper leakage or screen sharing violations.

title: Complete internal assessment coordinator capability test
description: Pass the operational readiness exam to gain credential rights.

title: Learn professional client communication SLAs
description: Study professional phrasing, feedback guidelines, SLA response timelines, and boundaries.

title: Learn 30-20-10 calling protocol & calendar setup
description: Understand intervals for candidate outreach and calendar invite details.

title: Pass Month 1 Phase 1 (Training) readiness evaluation
description: Score 90%+ in the comprehensive review to unlock Phase 2 Hands-on Floor entry.

title: Observe 3 client intake calls with Buddy
description: Listen to client feedback sessions and draft candidate requirements sheets.

title: Conduct 1 supervised client brief call
description: Manage candidate brief sessions under active lead observation.

title: Schedule invites and execute 30-20-10 protocol checks
description: Create calendar invites and run candidate outreach checks solo.

title: Perform screen & audio sharing tests on floor
description: Test and isolate feed issues for active candidate coding trials.

title: Log live Q&A feeds for 2 screening sessions
description: Input candidate evaluations live into tracking spreadsheets during active calls.

title: Compile and submit 2 completed candidate profiles
description: Write client-ready resume summaries and get TL approval.

title: Coordinate setup & recordings for 3 assessments solo
description: Manage the full assessment flow from credentials checks to record uploads.

title: Audit audio/video logs for cheating compliance
description: Review recordings of completed sessions for compliance violations against SOPs.

title: Resolve candidate credentials blockages independently
description: Resolve access blockages and candidate setup issues solo.

title: Pass Month 1 Hands-on floor entry certification review
description: Achieve 95%+ in the practical execution review to graduate to Month 2 Supervised Execution.
